zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Perrot Esq.於1405年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親Thomas Perrot24歲，母親Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton18歲。他於1434年與Jane Guise在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年7月23日在英國威爾斯布洛可爾享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Perrot Esq.于1405年出生在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可时，他的父亲Thomas Perrot24岁，母亲Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton18岁。他于1434年与Jane Guise在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年7月23日在英国威尔斯布洛可爾享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Perrot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Gilles, Veronique.
French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrotte .
Breton: from a French-influenced pet form (see 1 above) of the personal name Per, Breton form of Peter . Compare Perro .

variants.name: Pierre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Antoine, Yves, Michel, Jean Claude, Mireille, Jean Robert, Francois, Monique, Raoul, Serge.
French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian:

from the personal name Pierre, French form of Peter (see also below). This is one of the most frequent surnames in Haiti (along with Jean and Joseph ) and in Saint Martin. It is also established elsewhere in the West Indies (e.g. in Trinidad and Tobago, Saint Lucia, Grenada, and Bahamas).

variants.name: Perrotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Damien, Henri.
Altered form of French Perrot or Perrault , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Perrot  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Perrot Esq. was born in 1405, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Thomas Perrot, was 24 and his mother, Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton, was 18. He married Jane Guise in 1434, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 23 July 1474, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Perrot Esq. est né en 1405, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Thomas Perrot, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Jane Guise en 1434, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1474, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Perrot Esq. 1405 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Perrot 24 und seine Mutter Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton 18. Er hat 1434 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom Jane Guise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Juli 1474 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Perrot Esq. è nato il nel 1405 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Thomas Perrot, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Jane Guise nel 1434, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 luglio 1474, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Perrot Esq.が1405年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Thomas Perrotは24歳，母Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Pictonは18歳であった。1434年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでJane Guiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年7月23日にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Perrot Esq.(이)가 1405년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Perrot(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1434년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Jane Guise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 7월 23일 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Perrot Esq. nasceu em 1405, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Thomas Perrot, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Guise em 1434, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1474, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Perrot Esq. родился в 1405 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Thomas Perrot было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Guise в 1434 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 июля 1474 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Perrot Esq. nació en 1405, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Thomas Perrot, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Jane Guise en 1434, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de julio de 1474, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
